title: ceraia strigosa
intro: Ceraia strigosa, also known as the "ceraia strigosa" or "Indian ceraia", is a plant species native to India, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, this plant is used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ceraia strigosa include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, skin infections, and digestive issues, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The plant is often prepared in herbal form, including decoctions and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic use.
